Interface ILockInfo3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that supply lock information.

[Guid("801624F3-7507-429B-9E9A-8900C3044CA7")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ILockInfo3 : ILockInfo2, ILockInfo

The can_post flag of the lock.

bool
